descriptions: Bacchus has close relationships with Highlanders MC.
edges.evidence_quote: The club manages close relationships with other well-established Canadian motorcycle clubs like Para-dice Riders MC, Vagabonds MC, Highlanders MC, and the Charlottetown Harley Club.

descriptions: The two gangs were at war before merging.
edges.evidence_quote: For years, the Supreme Gangsters had an outstanding war with the Black Disciples Nation, led by David Barksdale.

descriptions: The two gangs agreed to a ceasefire and merged to form BGDN.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1969, Hoover and Barksdale agreed to a ceasefire. This resulted in the creation of the Black Gangster Disciple Nation.

descriptions: Sputniks viewed the Oxo group as invaders and enemies, referencing them in their motto.
edges.evidence_quote: The motto of the gang was 'He who comes to destroy us, will himself be destroyed' which is a direct reference to the Visayan gangs like the Oxo group who the Sputniks felt had 'invaded' the Tagalog territory of Manila.

Los Chone Killers.description: Ecuadorian criminal and narcoterrorist organization dedicated to drug trafficking, contract killing, and other crimes. Originally an armed wing of Los Choneros, it split off in 2020 after the assassination of its former leader Jorge Luis Zambrano. Based primarily in Guayas province with its center of operations in Durán. The group has been involved in prison massacres and terrorist attacks, and maintains a territorial dispute with the Latin Kings since 2023.

descriptions: Los Chone Killers and Latin Kings are engaged in turf wars involving car-bombings.
edges.evidence_quote: In the town of Durán, a key cocaine transshipment hub, turf wars between the Chone Killers (a splinter group of Los Choneros) and the Latin Kings have involved car-bombings targeting public officials.

descriptions: Los Chone Killers have a territorial dispute with Latin Kings in Durán since 2023.
edges.evidence_quote: La organización Chone Killers mantiene desde 2023 una disputa por el territorio contra los Latin Kings en la ciudad de Durán.

descriptions: Los Chone Killers list Los Choneros as enemies in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Los Choneros

descriptions: Los Chone Killers were originally an armed wing of Los Choneros, then separated in 2020.
edges.evidence_quote: Eran un brazo armado de Los Choneros hasta que se separaron en 2020

descriptions: Los Chone Killers were formerly part of Los Choneros but later attacked them.
edges.evidence_quote: El subgrupo de ... Los Chone Killers ... que funcionaban como parte de Los Choneros y protagonizaron la masacre carcelaria

descriptions: Los Chone Killers list Los Lagartos as occasional enemies in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Los Choneros , Latin Kings , Los Lagartos (en ocasiones)

descriptions: Los Chone Killers list Los Lobos as allies in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Los Tiguerones, Los Lobos

descriptions: Los Chone Killers and Los Pipos united to form Nueva Generación.
edges.evidence_quote: El subgrupo de Los Lobos , Los Tiguerones , Los Chone Killers y Los Pipos ... se unieron en una nueva estructura en 2021, la cual ha sido denominada Nueva Generación

descriptions: Los Chone Killers list Los Tiguerones as allies in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Los Tiguerones, Los Lobos

descriptions: Los Chone Killers originated from Los Ñetas.
edges.evidence_quote: El origen de los Chone Killers proviene de Los Ñetas

descriptions: Los Choneros have Los Chone Killers as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Los Lagartos, Los Lobos, Los Tiguerones, Los Chone Killers

descriptions: Los Chone Killers are current enemies of Los Choneros.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Los Chone Killers (actualmente)

descriptions: Los Lobos consider Los Chone Killers as enemies.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Los Choneros, Los Tiguerones, Los Chone Killers, Latin Kings

descriptions: Los Lobos and Los Chone Killers broke away from Los Choneros together.
edges.evidence_quote: broke away in 2020 after the death of Jorge Luis Zambrano, along with Los Chone Killers and Los Tiguerones

descriptions: Los Lobos and Los Chone Killers united to form Nueva Generación.
edges.evidence_quote: El subgrupo de Los Lobos , Los Tiguerones , Los Chone Killers y Los Pipos ... se unieron en una nueva estructura en 2021, la cual ha sido denominada Nueva Generación

descriptions: Los Tiguerones and Los Chone Killers are allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Los Chone Killers, Los Lobos, Jalisco New Generation Cartel, Kompania Bello

descriptions: Los Tiguerones and Los Chone Killers jointly killed inmates in a prison riot.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Chone Killers and Tiguerones killed sixty-eight inmates in November 2021 at a prison riot in Litoral Penitentiary.

descriptions: Los Tiguerones and Los Chone Killers united to form Nueva Generación.
edges.evidence_quote: El subgrupo de Los Lobos , Los Tiguerones , Los Chone Killers y Los Pipos ... se unieron en una nueva estructura en 2021, la cual ha sido denominada Nueva Generación

descriptions: George Street was formed to oppose Majestic Alley, indicating rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: George Street are a Bloods-affiliated street gang in Southside Belize City, allegedly formed in the late 1980s by US deportee Heathcliff Reyes to oppose the concurrently formed Majestic Alley (Crips).

descriptions: Majestic Alley is affiliated with Crips.
edges.evidence_quote: Majestic Alley are a Crips-affiliated street gang

Numbers Gang.description: The Numbers Gang is a South African prison-based criminal organization founded in the late 1800s in KwaZulu-Natal. It operates through three main factions: the 26s (smuggling), 27s (enforcement), and 28s (protection). The gang is known for its complex rules, internal hierarchy, and secretive nature, and traditionally does not operate outside of prisons.

descriptions: The Rebels motorcycle gang patched over to become part of Hells Angels in 1998.
edges.evidence_quote: In September 1998, the Rebels "patched over" to join the Hells Angels.

descriptions: Organisation of the Oppressed is possibly a front group sponsored by Hezbollah.
edges.evidence_quote: Hezbollah ... is the possible sponsor of a number of lesser-known militant groups, some of which may be little more than fronts for Hezbollah itself, including the Organisation of the Oppressed

descriptions: Bilal Mahfoud is a member of both Alameddine and R4W, indicating a structural link.
edges.evidence_quote: Alameddine/R4W member Bilal Mahfoud was shot at

descriptions: R4W is a subset of the Alameddine crime network.
edges.evidence_quote: The men arrested were part of a subset within the Alameddine crime network known as "R4W", or Ready for War.

Clan Graziano.description: The Clan Graziano is a Camorra clan originating from Quindici, Italy. It has been involved in a long-standing conflict with the rival Clan Cava since the 1980s, initially over post-earthquake reconstruction funds. The clan was part of the larger 'Clan dei Quindiciari' before splitting. It is known for the 2002 'Strage delle donne' massacre of three women from the Cava family.

descriptions: The two clans were in a feud.
edges.evidence_quote: uno dei più terribili atti della faida tra i Cava e i Graziano

descriptions: Clan Cava has been in a bloody feud with Clan Graziano for over thirty years.
edges.evidence_quote: Questa cosca , da oltre trent'anni, è protagonista di una sanguinosa faida con l'altro clan del Vallo di Lauro, quello dei Graziano .

descriptions: Members of the Graziano clan plotted to kill Salvatore Cava and his mother, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: sono stati arrestati 5 esponenti del clan Graziano, che stavano tramando l'eliminazione di Salvatore Cava (figlio del boss Biagio e scarcerato nel maggio dello stesso anno) e della madre di Salvatore Cava

descriptions: Cava and Graziano were in a feud since the early 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: La mattanza fu conseguenza della faida che, già dai primi anni '80, vedeva contrapposti i Cava ed i Graziano.

descriptions: Cava and Graziano were once allies before the 1980 earthquake.
edges.evidence_quote: Le due potenti cosche - un tempo alleate - entrano in guerra a seguito del Terremoto dell'Irpinia del 1980

descriptions: The Graziano and Cava families have been in a long-standing faida since the 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: faida di Quindici : faida più che decennale tra le famiglie Graziano e Cava

descriptions: The Graziano clan has been in a fierce conflict with the Cava clan for decades.
edges.evidence_quote: Da decenni è coinvolto in un feroce conflitto, nel quale è contrapposto al clan Cava.

descriptions: The two clans were previously allied in a single clan before splitting.
edges.evidence_quote: I due clan, fino ad allora alleati in un unico clan, si scindono.

descriptions: Graziano was part of the Clan dei Quindiciari alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: I Cava, i Graziano ed altre famiglie criminali erano strette in un'alleanza che formava quello che, un tempo, era detto Clan dei Quindiciari.

descriptions: The Graziano clan was part of the unified Clan dei Quindiciari along with the Cava and other families.
edges.evidence_quote: congiuntamente agli attuali rivali dei Cava e ad altre famiglie criminali, formava un unico gruppo camorristico, denominato "Clan dei Quindiciari".

descriptions: Grasso clan killed Fiore Graziano in a conflict to oust the Graziano.
edges.evidence_quote: Ad uccidere Graziano non sono stati i Cava, sono stati i Grasso (altra famiglia camorristica di Quindici), che vogliono scalzare i Graziano.

descriptions: The Graziano clan was in conflict with the Grasso family after the murder of Fiore Graziano.
edges.evidence_quote: l'omicidio del boss-sindaco Fiore Graziano - avvenuto nel settembre del '72 ad opera della famiglia Grasso -, un omicidio eccellente che aveva dato il via al conflitto Grasso-Graziano.

descriptions: Graziano joined the Nuova Camorra Organizzata in the early 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: l'adesione dei Graziano alla Nuova Camorra Organizzata

descriptions: The Graziano clan joined the Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: a seguito dell'adesione dei Graziano alla Nuova Camorra Organizzata

descriptions: A member of Clan Serino killed two nephews of a Graziano member.
edges.evidence_quote: un esponente del clan Serino avrebbe ucciso nel 1989 due nipoti di uno dei membri di spicco della famiglia Graziano

descriptions: The Milanese faction of Cursoti is allied with the Sciuto-Tigna clan.
edges.evidence_quote: In questo momento risulta legata da alleanza ai clan Cappello , Sciuto-Tigna e Piacenti detti Ceusi .

descriptions: H3 are a cell or splinter of the Caballeros Templarios.
edges.evidence_quote: diferentes células de los Caballeros Templarios entre ellos … los «h3»

descriptions: Los Viagras and H3 are rival splinter groups fighting for territorial control.
edges.evidence_quote: diferentes células de los Caballeros Templarios entre ellos «los viagras» y los «h3» se disputan el control territorial

The Order.description: Neo-Nazi organization active in the United States from September 1983 to December 1984. Founded by Robert Jay Mathews, the group raised funds through armed robbery and was involved in the murder of radio host Alan Berg. Inspired by The Turner Diaries, it aimed to overthrow the U.S. government and establish a white homeland. The group was dismantled after a shootout that killed Mathews.

descriptions: The Order was formed by Aryan Nations members and had ties to the organization.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1983, Robert Jay Mathews, who had visited the Aryan Nations compound many times, formed The Order, along with Aryan Nations members Dan Bauer, Randy Duey, Denver Parmenter, and Bruce Pierce.

edges.source: The Covenant, the Sword, and the Arm of the Lord
descriptions: The CSA had links to The Order.
edges.evidence_quote: The CSA had links to other radical organizations, including the Aryan Brotherhood, the Mountain Church, and The Order

descriptions: The Order is affiliated with Aryan Nations according to the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Affiliations: Aryan Nations

descriptions: The Order distributed robbery proceeds to the National Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Proceeds from these robberies were distributed to leaders of sympathetic organizations such as William Pierce (National Alliance) and Frazier Glenn Miller, Jr. (White Patriot Party).

descriptions: The Order distributed robbery proceeds to the White Patriot Party.
edges.evidence_quote: Proceeds from these robberies were distributed to leaders of sympathetic organizations such as William Pierce (National Alliance) and Frazier Glenn Miller, Jr. (White Patriot Party).

descriptions: The Order II grew out of the original Order, attempting to perpetuate its activities.
edges.evidence_quote: Order II (Bruder Schweigen Strike Force II) was also anti-government and antisemitic.

Metz Gang.description: The Metz Gang was a drug ring founded by Glenn Metz and his brother Cordell Metz, active from 1985 to 1992 in New Orleans. It distributed approximately 1,000 kilograms of cocaine in the New Orleans metropolitan area and committed murders, attempted murders, and other violent crimes. The gang was dismantled after a 1993 conviction of its leaders.

descriptions: The infobox lists the Sam Clay organization as a rival of the Metz Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Various organizations over, Sam Clay organization

descriptions: Hells Angels aligned with Satans Soldiers.
edges.evidence_quote: The Australian Hells Angels have aligned themselves with the Coffin Cheaters , Immortals, Red Devils , Satans Soldiers, Vikings and the Prisoners of War

descriptions: A Klan leader and a National Socialist Liberation Front leader were arrested together for assaulting a JDL infiltrator.
edges.evidence_quote: Edwin L. Reynolds, the Grand Dragon of the White Knights, a New Jersey Ku Klux Klan group, and John Duffy, a leader in the National Socialist Liberation Front and one another man were arrested

descriptions: SSA-S was established by Yawd Serk from SURA soldiers.
edges.evidence_quote: Lieutenant General Yawd Serk of the Shan United Revolutionary Army (SURA) led 800 soldiers under his command to central Shan State and established the Shan State Army – South (SSA-S) on 26 January 1996

descriptions: SPLM-N (Agar) is listed as an opponent of RSF.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... SPLM-N (Agar)

Black Dragons.description: Chinese-American criminal organization and street gang formed in 1980 by Chinese immigrants in Lincoln Heights, Los Angeles. Operated in Los Angeles and San Gabriel Valley, involved in both organized crime (extortion, prostitution, money laundering, narcotics, counterfeiting) and street-level crime (murder, robbery, home invasion). At its peak had over 100 core members. Dismantled in 2002-2003 after FBI's Operation Back Door, but reportedly revived around 2020.

descriptions: 14k Triad is listed as an ally of the Black Dragons in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wah Ching , Vietnamese Boyz Gang, Oriental Lazy Boyz , Asian Boyz , Hop Sing Tong, United Bamboo Triad, 14k Triad

descriptions: Asian Boyz is listed as an ally of the Black Dragons in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wah Ching , Vietnamese Boyz Gang, Oriental Lazy Boyz , Asian Boyz , Hop Sing Tong, United Bamboo Triad, 14k Triad

descriptions: Hop Sing Tong is listed as an ally of the Black Dragons in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wah Ching , Vietnamese Boyz Gang, Oriental Lazy Boyz , Asian Boyz , Hop Sing Tong, United Bamboo Triad, 14k Triad

descriptions: Oriental Lazy Boyz is listed as an ally of the Black Dragons in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wah Ching , Vietnamese Boyz Gang, Oriental Lazy Boyz , Asian Boyz , Hop Sing Tong, United Bamboo Triad, 14k Triad

descriptions: Tiny Rascals is listed as a rival of the Black Dragons in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Tiny Rascals

descriptions: United Bamboo Triad is listed as an ally of the Black Dragons in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wah Ching , Vietnamese Boyz Gang, Oriental Lazy Boyz , Asian Boyz , Hop Sing Tong, United Bamboo Triad, 14k Triad

descriptions: Vietnamese Boyz Gang is listed as an ally of the Black Dragons in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wah Ching , Vietnamese Boyz Gang, Oriental Lazy Boyz , Asian Boyz , Hop Sing Tong, United Bamboo Triad, 14k Triad

descriptions: Wah Ching is listed as an ally of the Black Dragons in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wah Ching , Vietnamese Boyz Gang, Oriental Lazy Boyz , Asian Boyz , Hop Sing Tong, United Bamboo Triad, 14k Triad

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Asian Boyz, Bamboo Union, Black Dragons, Chung Ching Yee, Wo Hop To

descriptions: The two sets held a peace meeting in 2022, which was successful in preventing further homicides.
edges.evidence_quote: Skipp Townsend held a peace meeting over brunch with the rivaling Rollin' 60s Crips and Inglewood Family Bloods at a restaurant in Manhattan Beach.

Mafia Capitale.description: Mafia Capitale is an organized crime organization based in Rome, Italy, founded in 1999 by Massimo Carminati and Salvatore Buzzi. It engaged in money laundering, racketeering, political corruption, and bid rigging, stealing funds from city services. The organization was dismantled following a major investigation in 2014, and in 2020 Italy's Supreme Court ruled that its acts did not constitute mafia association.

descriptions: Morabito contacted Mafia Capitale leaders in Rome via Sculli.
edges.evidence_quote: A Roma , sempre tramite Sculli , sono stati peraltro in contatto con i vertici di Mafia Capitale

descriptions: The Casamonica clan had criminal links with the Mafia Capitale network.
edges.evidence_quote: sono stati accertati i loro legami criminali con il clan dei Casamonica

descriptions: Mafia Capitale is a successor or continuation of Banda della Magliana.
edges.evidence_quote: Mafia Capitale (which was partially a successor or continuation of Banda della Magliana, involving many former Banda della Magliana members and associates)

descriptions: Mafia Capitale was founded from the remains of Banda della Magliana.
edges.evidence_quote: It was founded in the early 2000s by Massimo Carminati from the remains of the Banda della Magliana.

Zemun Clan.description: The Zemun Clan is a Serbian mafia organization based in Zemun, a municipality of Belgrade. It rose to prominence between 2000 and 2003, becoming one of the most powerful criminal groups in Southeast Europe. The clan is involved in drug trafficking, arms smuggling, extortion, and contract killings. Its leaders included Dušan Spasojević and Milorad Ulemek, and it had ties to Serbian state security services. The group was heavily targeted after the assassination of Prime Minister Zoran Đinđić in 2003.

descriptions: Parisi-Palermiti clan cooperated with Serbian traffickers (Zemun clan).
edges.evidence_quote: The Parisi-Palermiti clan had established direct contacts with Serbian traffickers

descriptions: The Serb mafia is allied with Zemun Clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hells Angels , Brödraskapet , Fucked For Life , Bratva , Obshchak , Zemun Clan , Serb Volunteer Guard

descriptions: Red Berets paramilitaries joined the clan, increasing its power.
edges.evidence_quote: El clan creció en importancia después de la caída de Slobodan Milošević con la llegada de muchos paramilitares boinas rojas, incluyendo Milorad Ulemek.

descriptions: Zemun clan member worked for the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: In Italy he became a leading heroin distributor and professional hitman, working for the Camorra in Naples

descriptions: Zemun Clan incorporated members from the Special Operations Unit.
edges.evidence_quote: The Zemun clan grew in prominence after the downfall of Slobodan Milošević with an influx of many veterans of the Special Operations Unit (widely known as Red Berets), including the unit's commander, Milorad Ulemek.

descriptions: Zemun Clan attempted to assassinate the leader of Surčin clan, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2002, the clan attempted to assassinate Buha twice

descriptions: Zemun Clan initially operated under or in cooperation with Surčin clan for car theft.
edges.evidence_quote: Presumably, the group operated either under the control, or in cooperation with, the Surčin clan, the largest organised car theft group in the country.
